items.title: Ninja’s new premium FlexFlame ProConnect 5-in-1 smart electric + propane grill & smoker at a $1,100 low
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you can find the new Ninja FlexFlame ProConnect 5-in-1 Grill & Smoker down at $1,099.99 shipped with its second-ever discount, which happens to match the price we’re seeing from the brand’s direct website. This new grill and smoker has only been on the market since February, with the first discount having appeared during March’s Big Spring Sale event that saw it taken down from its $1,300 full price to this same rate. Now, you’re getting a second chance at the $200 savings, giving you a more advanced 5-in-1 electric and propane cooking solution for your summer cookouts at the best price we have tracked.
